name: Molasses Refrigerator Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, allspice, and nutmeg; set aside.
2. Cream together shortening and sugar in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy, using an electric mixer at medium speed.
3. Add eggs, beating well. Blend in molasses and butter/sour milk.
4. Add the dry ingredients all at once, stirring just enough to moisten.
5. Stir in raisins.
6. Spoon the batter into greased 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling each about halfway full.
7. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve hot with butter and jam.
NOTE:
The batter can be stored in the refrigerator in a covered container for up to 3 weeks.
